Class Card

java.lang.Object
edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
public final class Card extends Object
Immutable card from a standard poker deck.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Card(Rank rank, Suit suit)
    Creates a card with rank and suit.

  • Constructor Details

    • Card

      public Card(Rank rank, Suit suit)
      Creates a card with rank and suit.
      Parameters:
      rank - card rank
      suit - card suit

  • Method Details

    • getRank

      public Rank getRank()
      Gets the card rank.
      Returns:
      rank

    • getSuit

      public Suit getSuit()
      Gets the card suit.
      Returns:
      suit

    • getInitialTableValue

      public int getInitialTableValue()
      Gets the value used when this card opens the table pile.
      Returns:
      initial table value

    • isFlexible

      public boolean isFlexible()
      Indicates whether this card can be played with more than one value.
      Returns:
      true for aces

    • resolvePlayValue

      public int resolvePlayValue(int currentSum, int limit)
      Resolves the value used when this card is played.
      Parameters:
      currentSum - current table sum
      limit - maximum allowed table sum
      Returns:
      value applied by this card

    • canBePlayed

      public boolean canBePlayed(int currentSum, int limit)
      Checks if this card is legal for the current table sum.
      Parameters:
      currentSum - current table sum
      limit - maximum allowed table sum
      Returns:
      true when playing the card keeps the sum within the limit

    • getShortName

      public String getShortName()
      Gets a compact label for the GUI.
      Returns:
      display label

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Gets a readable label for logs and tests.
      Returns:
      display name
